description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsDark green bag with branding in the frontTwo short handlesTwo main zippered compartments with an internal zippered compartment in one main compartmentOne zippered compartment at the backOne small zippered compartment with a flap in frontThree small compartments with press button closures and buckle detail on two of themMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 26 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 12 cm
